sourceList.title: Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - ULRIC [II] (-1 Feb 1275, bur Feldbach).
Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - ULRIC [II] de Ferrette, son of FREDERIC [II] Comte de Ferrette & his second wife Heilwig von Urach (-1 Feb 1275, bur Feldbach).

zh.Upper,Alsace,France: 加拿大安大略省帕里 索德尼皮辛阿爾薩斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ulrich II de Ferrette於大約1200年出生在法國阿爾薩斯時，他的父親Frédéric II. Comte de Ferrette31歲，母親Heilwig von Urach-13歲。他和AGNES VERGY至少有1個女兒。他在法國阿爾薩斯被列為landvogt。他去世於1275年2月1日享年76歲。

zh-hans.Upper,Alsace,France: 加拿大安大略省帕里 索德尼皮辛阿爾薩斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ulrich II de Ferrette于大约1200年出生在法国阿爾薩斯时，他的父亲Frédéric II. Comte de Ferrette31岁，母亲Heilwig von Urach-13岁。他和AGNES VERGY至少有1个女儿。他在法国阿爾薩斯被列为landvogt。他去世于1275年2月1日享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ferrette
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Aldo, Antonio, Carlo, Dante, Domenic, Quinto, Alessandro, Attilio, Carmello, Caesar, Cosimo, Cosmo.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of a diminutive of   Ferro  .

variants.name: Ferretiz
meanings: Hispanic (Mexico; Ferrétiz): probably an altered form of Italian Ferretti , influenced by the Spanish patronymic suffix -ez.

variants.name: Ferro
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Antonio, Angelo, Mario, Pasquale, Alberto, Antonino, Bernardo, Guido, Carmine, Concetta, Dino, Ottavio, Pietro, Rocco.  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Luis, Carlos, Ramon, Eduardo, Fermin, Sixto, Angel.

Italian, Spanish, Portuguese, and Maltese: from ferro ‘iron’ (from Latin ferrum), used as a nickname denoting someone who was strong or as a metonymic occupational name for someone who produced or worked iron.
Italian: from a medieval personal name, preserved in the modern pet form Ferruccio.

nameMeanings.name: Ulrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from uodal ‘riches’ + rīc ‘power’; the name of two major German saints, Ulrich of Augsburg ( d. 973 ) and Ulrich of Cluny ( c.1018–93 ), and the Blessed Ulrich of Einsiedeln in Switzerland ( d. c.980 ).

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Ulrich II de Ferrette was born about 1200, in Alsace, France, his father, Frédéric II. Comte de Ferrette, was 31 and his mother, Heilwig von Urach, was -13. He had at least 1 daughter with AGNES VERGY. His occupation is listed as landvogt in Alsace, France. He died on 1 February 1275, at the age of 76.

fr.Upper,Alsace,France: Alsace, Nipissing, Parry Sound, Ontario, Canada
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ulrich II de Ferrette est né environ 1200, à Alsace, France, son père, Frédéric II. Comte de Ferrette, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Heilwig von Urach, avait -13 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec AGNES VERGY. Sa profession de son indiquée est landvogt à Alsace, France. Il est décédé le 1 février 1275, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.Upper,Alsace,France: Alsace, Nipissing, Parry Sound, Ontario, Kanada
de.lifeSummary: Als Ulrich II de Ferrette um 1200 in Elsaß, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Frédéric II. Comte de Ferrette 31 und seine Mutter Heilwig von Urach -13. Er hatte mit AGNES VERGY mindestens 1 Tochter. sein Beruf ist als landvogt in Elsaß, Frankreich aufgeführt. Er starb am 1. Februar 1275 im Alter von 76 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ulrich II de Ferrette è nato il circa 1200 nel Alsace, Francia, il suo padre, Frédéric II. Comte de Ferrette, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Heilwig von Urach, aveva -13 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con AGNES VERGY. La sua occupazione è indicata come landvogt nel Alsace, Francia. Morì il 1 febbraio 1275, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.Ferrette, Haut-Rhin, Alsace, France: フランスハウト-ルヒンフエレット
ja.Upper,Alsace,France: カナダオンタリオ州パーリー ソウンドニパシングアルサス
ja.lifeSummary: Ulrich II de Ferretteが約1200年にフランスアルサスで生まれた時，父Frédéric II. Comte de Ferretteは31歳，母Heilwig von Urachは-13歳であった。彼はAGNES VERGYとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。フランスアルサスでの職業はlandvogtと記録されている。彼は1275年2月1日に76歳で死去した。

ko.Upper,Alsace,France: 캐나다 온타리오주 파리 소우드 니피징 알사스
ko.lifeSummary: Ulrich II de Ferrette(이)가 대략 1200년 프랑스 알사스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Frédéric II. Comte de Ferrette(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Heilwig von Urach(은)는 -13세였다. 그는 AGNES VERGY(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 프랑스 알사스에서 landvogt이었다. 그는 1275년 2월 1일 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ulrich II de Ferrette nasceu aproximadamente 1200, em Alsace, França, seu pai, Frédéric II. Comte de Ferrette, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Heilwig von Urach, tinha -13 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com AGNES VERGY. Sua profissão aparece como landvogt em Alsace, França. Ele faleceu em 1 de fevereiro de 1275, com 76 anos.

ru.Upper,Alsace,France: алсеис, ниписсинг, парри соунд, Онтарио, Канада
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ulrich II de Ferrette родился около 1200 г. в местности алсеис, Франция, его отцу по имени Frédéric II. Comte de Ferrette было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Heilwig von Urach, -13. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от AGNES VERGY.  Он работал по профессии landvogt в местности алсеис, Франция. Он умер 1 февраля 1275 г. в возрасте 76 лет.
